description: Upgrade plan to migrate Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21, update build configuration (pom.xml or build.gradle), ensure compatibility with Java 21 language features and APIs
tasks.summary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21. Updated pom.xml compiler settings, applied OpenRewrite UpgradeToJava21 recipe. Build and unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4 (latest stable)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4.x, Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate javax.* packages to jakarta.* namespaces, update deprecated APIs and configuration properties
tasks.summary: Upgraded Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5, Spring Framework 6.x, migrated javax.* to jakarta.*, fixed CVE-2024-47554 in commons-io. Build and unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Upgrade project dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all project dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4, resolve any version conflicts, update deprecated dependencies
tasks.summary: Upgraded Spring Boot to 3.5.3 to fix CVEs in spring-core, spring-web, tomcat-embed-core, and logback-core. No remaining CVEs. Build and unit tests pass.
